MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE REINSTATE/EXONERATE BOND, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR NOV-22-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE REINSTATE/EXONERATE BOND CONTINUED FROM NOV-22-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-25-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER ORDER OF COURT. OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERED REAL PARTY IN INTEREST RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE REINSTATE/EXONERATE BOND: CONTINUED TO MONDAY, NOVEMBER 25, 2002. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH, CSR# 1193

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE REINSTATE/EXONERATE BOND. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED REAL PARTY IN INTEREST RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE REINSTATE/EXONERATE BOND, NOT TIMELY. HON. JAMES J.
